briefdescription.para: Power manager state Off.
Power manager state On.
Indicator for the number of power manager states.
Power manager states.

detaileddescription.para: Timeout for metrics tx request (e.g. 2h) NOTE: eMetricsTmo is only used for creation in constructor, real timeout value is set in configure function

briefdescription.para: Indicator for the number of timeout events.
Power manager timeout values.
Mailbox of the power manager.
Timer to control metrics TX interval.
timeout for metrics tx request (e.g. 2h)
Reset reason.
Reset reason string.
Boot counter.
report request receivers
message type in report request
Power manager task constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the class
The constructor updates boot count by calling the getter function of class BootCnt, allocate and register a mailbox and allocates the timer for metrics TX interval.

briefdescription.para: Power manager task destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Power Manager virtual task configure function.

detaileddescription.para: The configure function overloads the configure function of the task base class. It retrieves the configuration related to metrics by call of the function getCfgMetrics provided by the Config class, convert the timeout intervall in seconds and reconfigure the metrics wakeup interval with this value.

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for metrics TX interval timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eMetricsTxTimerExpired, set power manager as sender and put message into own (powermanager's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Send request accelerometer data message to RMS store task.

detaileddescription.para: The function send a message of type eRmsReport to RMS store mailbox by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class. This request is the trigger to send accelerometer RMS data to the cloud.

briefdescription.para: Send reset reason message to data manager task.

detaileddescription.para: The function send a message of type eResetCause with the attached reset reason string to data manager mailbox by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send boot count message to data manager task.

detaileddescription.para: The function send a message of type eBootCnt with the attached boot counter to data manager mailbox by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Register a task that contributes to device metrics for callback.

detaileddescription.para:
mboxId
The ID of the mailbox, must be ID from enum MboxId
mtype
The message type for the request, must be from enum msgType
The function expects the Mailbox ID of the task and the expected message type to use in the request.

briefdescription.para: Send metric request message to a task that contributes to metrics.

detaileddescription.para:
mboxId
The ID of the mailbox, must be ID from enum MboxId
mtype
The message type for the request, must be from enum msgType
The function send a message of type mtype to mboxId mailbox by calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class.

briefdescription.para: Send metric request message to all registered mailboxes.

detaileddescription.para: In a loop over all registered mailboxes the function calls member function metricProviderNotify with mailbox ID and message type from register lists.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for metrics TX interval timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call power manager timer expired function MetricsTxTimer_expired.

briefdescription.para: Function to disable UART.

detaileddescription.para: The function disable UART by calling power manager function uart0_set_enable

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable UART.

detaileddescription.para:
enable
true = enable UART, false = disable UART
The function enable or disable UART according to input parameter enable

briefdescription.para: Power Manager base class derived from task base class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The power manager task provides a timer to control the metrics TX interval (MetricsTxTimer). It provides methods to report reset cause and boot counter to the data manager task, to switch UART on and off, to register and notify the metrics providing tasks, to configure the metrics transmission interval and the task function. It furthermore declares a task init and a message handler function as pure virtual. These function must be implemented in all derived classes. Both are called in the task function, task init function at the beginning of the task function before entering the endless loop, the message handler function in the endless loop, directly after reading the message from the tasks mailbox.
